name: IT-secapi-llm-prompt-injection
description: Fence learner-controlled library context in the LLM system prompt with delimiter / role separation so untrusted learner text cannot alter system instructions, per the repo LLM prompt-injection checklist (structured output, delimiter wrapping, allowlist, break test).
acceptanceCriteria: F-139 remediated; injection negative-path break-test proves learner text cannot escape the context fence.
